umm.digiquilt.xmlsaveload
Class LoadXML

java.lang.Object
  umm.digiquilt.xmlsaveload.LoadXML

public class LoadXML
extends Object

Version:
$Revision: 1.2 $
Author:
DanielSelifonov, last changed by $Author: biatekjt $ on $Date: 2009-06-10 16:58:41 $

Constructor Summary
LoadXML(InputStream in)
          Load all of the saved XML data from the specified InputStream.
LoadXML(String filename)
          Loads all of the save data from the specified file name into this LoadXML.

Constructor Detail

LoadXML

public LoadXML(String filename)
        throws IOException,
               SAXException
Loads all of the save data from the specified file name into this LoadXML.

Parameters:
filename - The file to be loaded.
Throws:
SAXException
IOException

LoadXML

public LoadXML(InputStream in)
        throws IOException,
               SAXException
Load all of the saved XML data from the specified InputStream.

Parameters:
in -
Throws:
IOException
SAXException
Method Detail

getCurrentBlock

public Block getCurrentBlock()
Returns:
The block that was marked as the current block from the XML file. If there wasn't one, or nothing has been loaded yet, it will be null.

getUndoRedoStack

public UndoRedoStack getUndoRedoStack()
Returns:
An UndoRedoStack containing all the undos and redos loaded from XML, in the proper order and in the correct stacks. If no XML has been loaded, this will still be null.

getGrid

public Grid getGrid()
Returns:
The grid that was loaded from XML, if any. If there wasn't one, this may be null.

getNotes

public String getNotes()
Returns:
the notes loaded from this XML, if any. If there wasn't one, this may be null.

getChallenge

public Challenge getChallenge()
Returns:
the challenge loaded from XML, if any. IF there wasn't on, this may be null.

getStudent

public String getStudent()
Returns:
the name of the student that created this file.

getBlockName

public String getBlockName()
Returns:
the name of the quilt block.

getTimestamp

public long getTimestamp()
Returns:
the timestamp from the file.
